news.t: Pacer ETFs Expands Cash Cows ETF™ Series With the Addition of a New Growth Rotation Fund and a Quality-Focused Fund

holdings.infoBox: LCOW is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.32%, Alphabet at 5.32%, Apple at 5.23%, Broadcom at 5.13%, and Microsoft at 4.87%.

overview.description: The Pacer S&P 500 Quality FCF Aristocrats ETF (LCOW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Quality FCF Aristocrats index. The fund is passively managed, seeking to provide exposure to the largest companies in the US with consistent positive cash flow-based financial strength. LCOW was launched on May 6, 2025 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Expands Cash Cows ETF™ Series With the Addition of a New Growth Rotation Fund and a Quality-Focused Fund
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $LCOW #ETF--Pacer ETFs adds two new strategies to its Cash Cows Series with a sector rotation fund and quality-focused fund.
